title: palicourea lasseri
intro: Palicourea lasseri is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the rubiacae family which includes coffee and gardenias. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Palicourea lasseri has been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Palicourea lasseri is typically used in teas or infusions, and its leaves can be dried and used in capsules or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
